creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John Grafton from comment #4)

From John's abandonment of D36950 (2023-02-28): 

> Dragonfly Mail Agent becoming the default mta makes this change moot. :)

(In reply to Alexander Vereeken from comment #0)

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/9eb502a3376163bc1b1c0650f08ab58785cf5fb5> (2022-12-05)

9eb502a33761 sendmail: revert to use use NONE

> The NONE parameter has been deprecated for more than 20 years
> but was never removed, its useful to simplify the sendmail
> management.
> 
> This reverts commit 7cadc52.

I think, this bug is both fixed and overcome by events. 

@sysinstall if you disagree, please reopen.
